title: Unovan Basculin to Basculegion with ancient power - Cobblemon
description: Cobblemon: Unovan Basculin evolve into Basculegion by Ancient Power
body:
### **Unovan Basculin to Basculegion with Ancient Power**
_by CopperLord44_

A small Cobblemon datapack that lets Unovan Basculin (Red-Striped and Blue-Striped) evolve into Basculegion by learning Ancient Power.

Changes:
- Adds Ancient Power to Unovan Basculin at level 33.
- Adds an evolution: on level-up, if Basculin knows Ancient Power -> Basculegion.
- White-Striped (Hisuian) Basculin keeps its original recoil-based evolution.

Install:
1) Drop this .zip into: <world>/datapacks/
2) Run /reload
3) Verify with: /datapack list
